history.detail: Repository created under mandate 'nizam-framework genesis'. Branch phase/001-framework-genesis. Orchestrator entering planning; delegating to @planner.

@planner produced product_spec.md (spec v1.0.0), feature_list.json (8 features, DAG validated acyclic, original_estimate_lines=3850), and docs/planning/manifest.json. Ready for contract negotiation on feature 000. [Timestamp corrected 2026-07-07 from 08:00:00Z (planner self-reported estimate) to 07:27:00Z (actual completion, per planner run duration); original value made history non-monotonic and causally misordered vs the 07:35 contract-revision event.]
Contract 000 rev1: validator A approved; evaluator rejected (false-pass grep, missing README-stub coverage, no evidence convention); generator revised; evaluator re-review in flight.
Contract 000 rev1 approved by validator (Mode A) and evaluator. Delegating implementation to @generator.
Feature 000 complete: validator B approved, QA pass (qa/000.json, 6/6 checks + adversarial spot-check). 213 lines vs 220 estimate. Advancing to feature 001.
Contract 001 approved first-pass by validator (Mode A) and evaluator. Delegating implementation.
Feature 001 Mode B rejected: out-of-scope CHANGELOG edit, NizamIQ string in schema/README.md:57, draft-07 wording mismatch. Generator rework attempt 1 dispatched.
Feature 001 complete after 1 Mode-B rework. QA pass 6/6 + adversarial DD-3 negative test. 603 lines vs 450 estimate. Cumulative 816/5005 ceiling. Advancing to 002.
Contract 002 approved after 2 evaluator-driven revisions (duplicate verification entry; locale-dependent sort). Delegating implementation.
Feature 002 complete: Mode B approved first pass (AH-4 ruled legitimate source-backed distillation), QA 7/7 + adversarial pass. 520 lines vs 720 est. Cumulative 1336/5005. Advancing to 003.
Contract 003 approved first-pass by both gates. Delegating implementation.
Feature 003 complete: both gates first-pass, QA 7/7 + 3-part adversarial pass. 900 lines = estimate. Cumulative 2236/5005. Advancing to 004.
Contract 004 approved first-pass by both gates. Delegating implementation.
Feature 004 complete: both gates first-pass, QA 9/9 + filled-template adversarial pass. 307 lines vs 410 est. Cumulative 2543/5005. Advancing to 005.
Contract 005 approved first-pass by both gates (vendor-neutrality blacklist verified consistent with scope). Delegating implementation.
Feature 005 complete: both gates first-pass, QA 9/9 + adapter-simulation adversarial pass. 494 lines vs 450 est. Cumulative 3037/5005. Advancing to 006 (deps 000-005 all complete).
Contract 006 approved after 1 revision (path-walker false-fail/false-pass defects fixed, independently re-verified by evaluator). Delegating implementation.
Feature 006 complete: contract took 1 revision (path-walker), Mode B first-pass, QA 11/11 + router adversarial pass. 516 lines vs 400 est. Cumulative 3553/5005. Advancing to 007 (final feature).
Contract 007 approved after 1 revision (Keep-a-Changelog ordering corrected — orchestrator instruction overruled by evaluator; floating-branch grep precision). Delegating implementation.

Feature 007 complete (QA 12/12 + drift-detection e2e). All 8 features complete. Final review sweep clean: zero branding/endpoint strings in shipped files, NIZAM.json schema-valid with all 71 paths resolving, all frontmatter complete, bootstrap.sh functional. Total 3988/5005 lines (80% of estimate ceiling). Phase 001-framework-genesis CLOSED. Awaiting human: PR + v0.1.0 tag.

Human decisions received: (1) NDEBT-001 resolved - repo deliberately kept outside ecosystem scope; (2) canonical origin https://github.com/niq-cnr/nizam-framework.git. Feature 008 (canonical origin wiring) added as human-authorized post-phase amendment. Standard contract loop applies.
Micro-contract 008 approved after 1 revision (pathspec-scoped numstat false-pass gap closed with unscoped name-only check). Delegating implementation.
Feature 008 complete: contract 1 revision (unscoped diff check), Mode B + QA 5/5 first-pass. Canonical origin wired into bootstrap.sh. Phase 001 closed again; proceeding to push + PR.

PR #1 code-review findings triaged: shipped-content and live-state fixes bundled as feature 009 (review remediation); findings against completed contracts/evidence/qa artifacts skipped as immutable audit records with gaps already mitigated at QA time. history planning_complete timestamp corrected in this same update.
Contract 009 (review remediation) approved first-pass by both gates; all 6 scrutinized verification mechanisms fixture-tested. Delegating implementation.

Feature 009 complete: both gates first-pass, QA 16/16 + python3-less --verify-only simulation + frontmatter schema re-validation. 15 still-valid review findings fixed across 27 files; 13 findings on immutable audit artifacts skipped with documented reasons. Pushing to PR #1.

PR #1 follow-up review comment 3538444007 verified valid: verdict-shape drift across AGF.md predicates (nested paths), AGF.md example (sibling arrays), 01_execution.md predicates (nested paths), SKILL.md Sec 7 example (nested arrays). Feature 010 registered; canonical shape = sibling arrays per actual pipeline practice. All 29 prior review threads answered on the PR.
Contract 010 (verdict shape canonicalization) approved first-pass by both gates; extraction/assertion mechanisms fixture-tested against live files. Delegating implementation.

Feature 010 complete: both gates first-pass, QA 9/9 + parse-and-gate adversarial simulation. Verdict shape canonicalized (sibling arrays) across AGF.md, 01_execution.md, SKILL.md. All 30 PR #1 review threads answered on GitHub. Pushing.

PR #1 merged to main by human (merge commit b1ea7e6). Release prep: CHANGELOG Unreleased entries folded into [0.1.0] (dated 2026-07-08) on branch chore/release-v0.1.0 per methodology/05_release_train.md; v0.1.0 tag to be cut on the release-prep merge commit.

Phase 002-self-compliance authorized by human ("approved. please proceed.", 2026-07-08). Manifest flipped to in_progress; scope budget reset (770-line estimate, phase-001 final budget archived in phase_001_scope_budget_final). Beginning contract negotiation on feature 011.
Contract 011 approved after 1 revision (template-comment false-fail policy fix; substring false-pass replaced with YAML-parsed assertion; version-field coverage added). Delegating implementation.

Feature 011 complete: contract 1 revision (template-comment false-fail, substring false-pass, version coverage), Mode B + QA 9/9 first-pass + template-fidelity adversarial. 218 lines vs 100 est (first feature of phase - no rolling baseline per 00_planning bootstrap rule; cumulative 218/1001 healthy). Advancing to 012.
Contract 012 approved after 2 revisions (no-op-stub false-pass closed with stdout assertions + C5-C8 mutation tests; git-clone false-fail replaced with cp -a isolation). Delegating implementation.

Feature 012 complete (contract 2 revisions incl. no-op-stub and cp-a false-fail catches; Mode B + QA 17/17 first-pass; QA independently ran all 4 mutation tests + historical-defect regression). Contract-scoped 818 lines vs 360 estimate -> per-feature flag (3x rolling avg = 243). Cumulative 899/1001 (89.8%); remaining estimates (~310) project a cumulative-ceiling breach during feature 014. Pipeline paused: feature 013 will NOT begin until human acknowledgment is recorded, per Scope Budget Protocol.

Human acknowledged the feature-012 scope flag and authorized re-baseline (option 1): original_estimate_lines 770 -> 1250, ceiling 1625. Plan Amendment Rule applies (human-authorized, orchestrator-recorded). Pipeline resumed; feature 013 dependency gate satisfied (012 complete).
Contract 013 approved after 1 revision (multi-branch push false-pass + missing pull_request no-filter coverage, both fixed structurally with YAML-1.1 True-key defense). Delegating implementation.

Generator (feature 013 implementation) wrote to orchestrator-owned run_state.json despite explicit instruction: advanced current_feature to 014 prematurely, set status=implemented, added foreign keys (active_contract_id/last_action/completed_contract_ids). Violates AGF Sec 5 rule 4 (roles update only their assigned fields). Orchestrator restored correct state (feature 013 not complete until Mode B + QA pass); foreign keys removed; history/budget verified intact. Deviation logged for Mode B awareness; implementation artifacts themselves unaffected.

Feature 013 complete: contract 1 revision (multi-branch false-pass + PR-filter coverage), Mode B first-pass (incl. ratifying the run_state deviation remediation), QA 7/7 + CI dry-run adversarial proof (untagged fence blocks the run). 29 lines vs 50 est. Cumulative 928/1625. Advancing to 014.
Contract 014 approved first-pass by both gates (vacuous-match supersessions verified against live files; scope guard reproduced). Delegating implementation.

Feature 014 complete: both gates first-pass, QA 9/9 + self-referential adversarial audit. QA honestly self-reported that its own 012-014 evidence files predate-violate the new Evidence Capture Convention (script labels + session paths) - corrective item: all future evidence rounds, starting with 015, must comply with 04_tool_driven_state Sec 5. 158 lines vs 220 est. Cumulative 1086/1625. Advancing to 015 (deps 013+014 complete).
Contract 015 (phase close) approved first-pass by both gates. Delegating implementation.

Feature 015 complete: both gates first-pass, QA 6/6 + phase-completeness adversarial audit; evaluator evidence-format regression corrected (015-qa files strictly per 04 Sec 5). Phase 002-self-compliance CLOSED: 5/5 features through the full lifecycle, validator green (SUMMARY: 8 passed, 0 failed), cumulative 1121/1625. v0.2.0 release remains the human gate per 05_release_train Sec 6. Opening PR.

PR #3 review findings triaged per human instruction (verify/fix-valid/skip-with-reason): 7 still-valid (4 workflow hardenings incl. source-verified SHA pins checkout@11bd7190/setup-python@0b93645e, 2 validator fixes, 1 spec_002 tree line), 1 orchestrator state fix (manifest stale note, corrected in this update), 2 skipped (immutable 013-verify-05 evidence with companion-check coverage; completed-plan loose grep superseded by contract 014 v[7] exact assertion). Feature 016 registered per Plan Amendment Rule (00_planning Sec 9).

Contract 016 approved first-pass by both gates; evaluator empirically reproduced the C5-die abort and the comment-tolerance evasion pre-fix, and the corrected behavior post-fix. Delegating implementation.

Feature 016 complete: contract first-pass both gates, 1 post-approval amendment (unquoted-literal SyntaxError in v[5]; missing run_state exclusion in v[7] - both ratified by Mode B as test-defect corrections), QA 8/8 + API-anchored SHA verification + structural workflow regression. 49 lines vs 45 est. Cumulative 1170/1625. Pushing to PR #3 and answering review threads.

Phase 003-communication authorized by human. Budget reset (1395 est, ceiling 1813; phase-002 final archived). Execution order 017 -> 019 -> 018 -> 020 -> 022 (019 deliberately precedes 018 so the guide documents the corrected adoption contract); 021 LICENSE remains human-gated pending license choice. Beginning contract negotiation on 017.
Contract 017 approved first-pass by both gates. Delegating implementation.

Feature 017 complete: both gates first-pass (Mode B + QA). QA 13/13 verification commands independently re-run (exit 0 each) + mandatory adversarial spot-check (template instructional HTML comment block deleted in its entirety; authoritative_source repo-relative and frontmatter YAML-valid; product_spec.md 1.0.0/1.1.0 change_log entries byte-for-byte intact; non-goals held - no docs/guide/index.html, empty NIZAM.json diff, no out-of-scope edits; validate.sh SUMMARY: 8 passed, 0 failed). Deliverables: docs/architecture/ADR-002-html-user-guide.md (HTML user guide decision + docs/ shipped-vs-internal declaration) and product_spec.md amended to spec_version 1.2.0. 154 lines vs 130 est (contract-scoped: ADR 132+0, product_spec 19+3; first feature of phase 003, no rolling baseline). Cumulative 154/1813. QA evaluator surfaced a pre-existing schema/qa_verdict.schema.json drift (required keys verdict/executed_at/checks[] differ from the richer qa/*.json shape actually produced; unenforced by validate.sh) - logged as NDEBT-002. Advancing to 019 (deps [] satisfied) per execution order 017->019->018->020->022.

Contract 019 approved after 1 revision by both gates. Rev0 rejected on 3 real defects: (Mode A) H4 scope entry mislabeled interface.md pinned-checkout discovery as 'current item 3' when it is item 2; (evaluator) v2 repo-root-fallback check false-passed via the pre-existing 'root-relative' substring; (evaluator) v7's 'CI' 2-char token false-passed inside words like 'reconciled'. Rev1 fixes: dropped the numeric label + required the fallback be labeled 'framework checkout' (v2 now greps that literal phrase, absent pre-fix); v7 CI token now word-boundary anchored (\bCI\b or 'continuous integration') with CONTEXT.md/AGENTS.md filename-anchored. Both gates re-verified rev1: Mode A approved (ISSUE-1 resolved, no new defect); evaluator approved (both findings closed by dry-run, 9 unchanged entries byte-identical). Delegating implementation.

Contract 019 verification[10] (out-of-scope scope guard) amended post-approval (test-defect correction, NOT an implementation attempt): added "-- . ':(exclude).agent'" to 'git diff --name-only HEAD'. Generator implementation was CORRECT (10/11 verifications EXIT:0, validate.sh 8/8 green) but v11 as written scanned .agent/run_state.json, which the orchestrator legitimately modified during Loop-1 (circuit breaker + contract_approved history) BEFORE the generator ran; the generator correctly refused to touch run_state.json or the deliverables to route around it and flagged the defect (AH-2). Dry-run proof: raw diff lists the 4 deliverables + run_state.json; excluded diff lists only the 4 deliverables; run_state diff is +10/-1 orchestrator-only. Matches contract-014 form / feature-016 'missing run_state exclusion' precedent. To be ratified by Mode B. Generator instructed to re-capture 019-verify-11.txt with the corrected command.

Feature 019 Mode B APPROVED first-pass: exactly the 4 deliverables changed (each faithful to contract), all non-goals held, run_state.json diff orchestrator-only, every claim traces to bootstrap.sh, all 11 verifications EXIT:0, validate.sh 8/8. verification[10] .agent-exclusion amendment RATIFIED. Contract -> implemented. Proceeding to QA.

Feature 019 QA FAILED (honest catch by the adversarial spot-check that all 3 prior gates missed): standard/GIP.md Section 1 (Core Directive) line 22 still asserted the stale 3-dir payload '(standard/, templates/, schema/)', contradicting the corrected Section 2 item 2 and new Section 5.1 (both 4-dir + NIZAM.json) - H5 was not actually resolved; the doc was internally self-contradictory. Root cause: the contract scoped only the two Section 2 item-2 locations; verification[3] (block-scoped to Sec 2) and verification[4] (regex needing a literal 'and' Sec 1 lacks) silently passed over the third occurrence. Orchestrator AMENDMENT 2 (scope-completeness correction): expanded H5 GIP.md scope to include Section 1's Core Directive payload parenthetical + added generalized verification[11] (12th) guard asserting no single-line standard/+templates/+schema/ enumeration omits tools/ anywhere in GIP.md (dry-run flags exactly line 22 pre-fix, EXIT:1). Contract status reverted approved; 019-implementation circuit breaker attempts=2/3 (rework 1). Routing the QA report to @generator for the Section 1 fix; then re-run Mode B (ratify amendment) + QA.

Feature 019 complete: 1 contract revision + 2 orchestrator amendments (verification[10] .agent exclusion [test-defect]; H5 scope expansion to Section 1 + generalized guard [QA-driven scope-completeness], both Mode-B ratified) + 1 implementation rework (QA caught the GIP.md Section 1 stale 3-dir payload all 3 prior gates missed). Final gates: Mode B re-approved + QA 12/12 verifications EXIT:0 + 8-probe adversarial clean, validate.sh 8/8. Deliverables: tools/interface.md (H4 .nizam-first discovery + framework-checkout fallback), standard/GIP.md (H5 4-dir+NIZAM.json payload consistent across Sec 1/2/2.1/5.1, H8 existing-repo tiers), templates/README.md + methodology/README.md (H6 product_spec de-leak). 122 lines vs 190 est. Cumulative 276/1813. Advancing to 018 (dep 017 complete) - the self-contained HTML user guide centerpiece, which will document the now-corrected adoption contract.

Contract 018 (HTML user guide + NIZAM.json docs indexing) approved after 1 revision by both gates. Mode A approved rev0 on scope/spec fidelity; the evaluator's adversarial contract review REJECTED rev0 on 4 real verification-suite soundness defects (built fixtures A-F to prove each): (4) external-URL check matched only double-quoted attrs (single-quote external URL false-passed); (8) path-resolution regex captured trailing sentence periods (false-fail on real files); (11) Mode A/B used OR where scope demands AND; (15) scope guard used 'git diff --name-only HEAD' which never lists new untracked files, so it was blind to the guide (a new file) itself. Rev1 fixed all four + tightened sticky-TOC co-occurrence + added verification[16] acronym-expansion (NDS/AGF/GIP verbatim canonical titles; AGIP parenthetical-gloss only, since AGIP has no shipped expansion - honors External Anchor Rule / H7). Both gates re-approved rev1 with fixture-verified closure. 16 verification entries. estimated_lines 900 (large self-contained HTML). Delegating implementation. Implementation note: AGIP's gloss must be sourced (bootstrap.sh 'earlier prototype this evolved from'), not a fabricated 4-word expansion.

Feature 018 complete (the phase centerpiece): contract 1 revision (evaluator's adversarial contract review caught 4 verification-suite soundness defects, all fixed + acronym check added, both gates re-approved). Implementation first-pass: Mode B approved with a full AH-4 hallucination audit (all 6 factual-claim categories - discovery order, 4-dir+NIZAM.json payload, DD-1..DD-4, execution loop + 3-strike breaker, quickstart, AGIP gloss - trace to the post-019 shipped tree) + QA 16/16 + 8-probe adversarial clean (no hidden external request, no hallucinated claim across 5 re-audited claims, no false license assertion, print + dark/light present), validate.sh 8/8 incl C4 over the 3 new docs paths. Deliverables: docs/guide/index.html (720-line self-contained HTML user guide, all 10 sections, version-anchored to NIZAM.json framework.version 0.1.0 in meta+footer) + NIZAM.json docs module indexing both ADRs + the guide. 729 lines vs 900 est. Cumulative 1005/1813.

Feature 018's 729 lines trip the per-feature rolling-average flag (3x rolling avg of last 3 = 3x138 = 414). HEURISTIC FALSE-POSITIVE: 018 is the human-authorized planned centerpiece, estimated 900, delivered UNDER at 729; the rolling average is artificially low because 017 (154) and 019 (122) were small doc features. Cumulative 1005/1813 (55%) is healthy - no ceiling risk. Per Scope Budget Protocol the flag is non-halting for 018 but REQUIRES human acknowledgment before feature 020 begins. Pipeline paused: feature 020 will NOT start until the human acknowledges (surfaced to human 2026-07-08 alongside the rendered guide).

Human acknowledged the feature-018 per-feature scope flag ('Acknowledge & continue to 020'). Confirmed as a heuristic false-positive (under-estimate, planned centerpiece); no re-baseline needed (cumulative 1005/1813 healthy). Pipeline resumed; feature 020 dependency gate satisfied (018 complete). Beginning contract negotiation on 020.

Human resolved the F-021 LICENSE human gate: chose MIT (per the spec recommendation, matching the source repositories' lineage). F-021 (which runs after F-020) will add a top-level MIT LICENSE + a README license line. NOTE: feature 021's acceptance test forbids the substring 'nizamiq' in LICENSE (C5-style branding sweep), so the MIT copyright holder must be branding-neutral (e.g. 'The Nizam Framework Authors' / the maintainer's name), NOT 'NizamIQ'. F-021 is no longer blocked-on-human.

Contract 020 (first-contact truth fixes: CONTEXT.md rewrite + README.md quickstart + acronym expansion) approved after 1 revision by both gates. Mode A approved rev0; the evaluator's adversarial contract review REJECTED rev0 on 4 verification-suite defects (fixtures): (2) CONTEXT.md payload check VACUOUS (passed unedited because tools/+NIZAM.json appear elsewhere - missed the stale line-39 3-dir sentence); (9/NDS-AGF-GIP) UNSOUND (false-passed on 'NDS (Section 2)...' without the real phrases); (10/AGIP) weak parenthetical; (missing) README Release link committed in scope but unverified. Rev1 fixed all four: payload now the 019-precedent generalized stale-3-dir guard; NDS/AGF/GIP now requires verbatim canonical titles; AGIP now requires the sourced 'prototype' gloss; added a Release-link check. Both gates re-approved rev1 (evaluator's 2 low residuals independently judged non-blocking -> observations[], issues[] empty per parse rule). 18 verification entries. estimated_lines 210. Delegating implementation. Impl notes: canonical expansion phrases must be single-line (line-based grep); AGIP gloss parenthetical must contain 'prototype'; README must carry the exact URL github.com/niq-cnr/nizam-framework/releases/tag/v0.1.0; CONTEXT.md C8 via change_log frontmatter entry (NOT CHANGELOG - that is F-022).

Feature 020 complete: contract 1 revision (evaluator caught 4 verification-suite defects: vacuous payload check, unsound acronym check, weak AGIP gloss, missing Release-link check), Mode B + QA first-pass. Mode B ran a full AH-4 hallucination audit (quickstart works with real v0.1.0 tag; .nizam/ tree matches bootstrap payload; agent path + linked paths all real). QA 18/18 + 11-probe adversarial clean (no surviving staleness, no dangling paths, single-line acronym phrases, exact Release URL, clean frontmatter). validate.sh 8/8. Deliverables: CONTEXT.md (0.1.0->0.2.0, status active, de-staled, 4-dir payload, agent path, NDS/AGF/GIP, change_log entry - no CHANGELOG edit), README.md (quickstart + two-audience + guide/Release links + validator/CI/ADR + acronyms), bootstrap.sh (AGIP 'prototype' gloss). 75 lines vs 210 est. Cumulative 1080/1813. Advancing to 021 (LICENSE, MIT authorized by human) then 022 (phase close).

Contract 021 (LICENSE human gate, MIT) approved first-pass by both gates. Scope: create root LICENSE (full MIT text, 'Copyright (c) 2026 The Nizam Framework Authors' - branding-neutral, no 'nizamiq' per the F-021 acceptance test) + one README.md license notice naming MIT and linking LICENSE. 8 verifications (v2 strengthens the weak 'MIT License' regex to require the verbatim grant + warranty clauses; v8 scope guard uses git status --untracked-files=all, empirically proven to SEE the new LICENSE file where git diff HEAD would be blind). Mode A verified the branding-neutral holder + spec fidelity; evaluator dry-ran all 8 + positive-control fixture. Non-goals fence F-022 (CHANGELOG). Delegating implementation.

Contract 022 (phase-003 CLOSE: CHANGELOG entries + AGIP gloss + green validator + record 2 human gates) approved after 1 revision by both gates. Mode A approved rev0; the evaluator's contract review REJECTED rev0 on 2 HIGH-severity vacuous-match defects (fixtures): verification #1 'README|CONTEXT' whole-file grep matched pre-existing line 21 'README presence' (phase-002, inside [Unreleased]) and line 56 'CONTEXT/AGENTS' ([0.1.0]); #2 'interface.md' matched line 81 'tools/interface.md' in the released [0.1.0]. Rev1 scoped #1/#2/#9 to the awk-extracted [Unreleased] span with literal filenames (docs/guide/index.html+CONTEXT.md+README.md; interface.md+GIP.md; LICENSE); #3 AGIP correctly left whole-file (target in [0.1.0]). Both gates re-approved rev1 with wrong-section/right-section fixtures proving discrimination. 11 verifications. Scope: CHANGELOG.md only (add phase-003 [Unreleased] entries + minimal sourced AGIP prototype gloss at line 62); both human gates (v0.3.0 release, GitHub Pages) recorded but NOT executed. Delegating implementation - the final feature of phase 003.

Feature 022 complete (phase-003 CLOSE): contract 1 revision (evaluator caught 2 HIGH vacuous-match defects - whole-file greps satisfied by pre-existing README/interface.md text in other CHANGELOG sections; rev1 scoped #1/#2/#9 to the awk-extracted [Unreleased] span with literal filenames), Mode B + QA first-pass. Both gates ran AH-4 accuracy cross-checks (every CHANGELOG entry accurately describes its deliverable) + [Unreleased]-scoping fixtures. QA 11/11 + 6-probe adversarial clean. validate.sh 8/8. Deliverable: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] gained phase-003 entries (guide + NIZAM.json docs indexing + LICENSE Added; CONTEXT.md + README.md Changed; interface.md + GIP.md Fixed) + a minimal sourced AGIP 'prototype' gloss in [0.1.0]. 35 lines vs 60 est. Cumulative 1140/1813 (63%).

Phase 003-communication CLOSED. All 6 features (017-022) through the full planner->contract->Mode A->evaluator review->implement->Mode B->QA lifecycle with durable .agent/ state; validator green (SUMMARY: 8 passed, 0 failed) on the final tree; cumulative 1140/1813 (63% of ceiling, well under the 130% halt). Notable process events: the independent QA adversarial gate caught a real GIP.md Section-1 stale-payload defect all 3 prior gates missed (F-019 rework); the contract-testability evaluator rejected 4 of 6 feature contracts on genuine verification-suite soundness defects (018: 4 fixtures incl. a git-diff-blind-to-new-files scope guard; 020: vacuous payload + unsound acronym checks; 022: 2 vacuous CHANGELOG whole-file greps) - each fixed pre-implementation; F-018 tripped the rolling-average scope flag (heuristic false-positive, human-acknowledged); NDEBT-002 logged (qa_verdict.schema.json drift). Human decision received: MIT license (F-021). THREE HUMAN GATES OUTSTANDING, NONE executed by the pipeline: (1) v0.3.0 release - MINOR per 05_release_train (new user guide + additive docs; interface.md discovery is a doc fix, .nizam/ layout unchanged, not a breaking runtime change); (2) GitHub Pages publishing for docs/guide/; (3) human review/merge of the phase/003-communication PR. Also still open upstream: the v0.2.0 roll-up PR #4 (unmerged; NIZAM.json framework.version still 0.1.0 on this branch). Awaiting human.

Phase 003 handed off to human review on authorization ('Push + open PR'): pushed the 6 feature commits (f84cca0..e6024c2) to origin/phase/003-communication and opened PR #5 (https://github.com/niq-cnr/nizam-framework/pull/5) into main, with the phase summary + the 3 outstanding human gates (PR merge, v0.3.0 release, GitHub Pages) in the body incl. an Ecosystem Impact section (none - NDEBT-001, repo out of ECOSYSTEM.json scope). Pipeline self-merges nothing. Awaiting human review/merge.

Phase 004-durable-enforcement ACTIVATED by human ('approved. please proceed.', 2026-07-08) after PR #5 (phase 003) and PR #6 (release roll-up) merged and v0.2.0+v0.3.0 were released. Branch phase/004-durable-enforcement rebased onto the released main (913aa49). Manifest flipped to in_progress/active; scope budget reset (1250 est, ceiling 1625 at 130%; phase-003 final archived as phase_003_scope_budget_final). 8 features 023-030 realize R1 narrative-truth CI checks (C9 path-resolution + C10 single-source-of-truth consistency), R2 hermetic e2e bootstrap test, R3 tools/verify_lib.sh vetted verification library + authoring standard, R4 schema reconciliation + C11 dogfood validation (resolves NDEBT-002). Execution begins at feature 023 (tools/verify_lib.sh - foundational, so later contracts compose vetted primitives). Adding C9/C10/C11 migrates the validator SUMMARY 8->11 (immutable historical records keep '8 passed'). Beginning contract negotiation on 023.

Contract 023 (tools/verify_lib.sh vetted verification library + fixtures, R3 foundational) approved after 1 revision by both gates. Mode A approved rev0; the evaluator's adversarial contract review REJECTED rev0 on 2 real verification-soundness defects it proved with a content-blind stub: (HIGH) entries 7/8/15/16 passed the fixture's own path (filename encoding _pass/_fail) to section_grep/no_stale_payload, so a filename-keyed stub passed without reading content; (MED) entry 2's SOURCED_OK check didn't prove side-effect-freedom. Rev1 fixes: copy fixtures to a neutral $tmp/doc.md before invoking (defeats filename-keyed stubs - FAIL entries 8/16 now reject the stub); entry 2 asserts empty stdout+stderr+rc0; plus a version-DECREASE fail fixture (evaluator proved it catches an equality-only comparison bug). Both gates re-approved rev1 with fresh adversarial evidence. Fittingly, the verification-library feature's own verification had a cheatable-fixture defect - caught pre-implementation. 19 verifications, 12 files (verify_lib.sh + 11 fixtures). Orchestrator fixed a cosmetic non_goals count (ten->eleven). Delegating implementation.

Feature 023 complete (phase-004 foundational): tools/verify_lib.sh (5 vetted primitives vlib_section_grep/scope_guard/version_increased/path_resolves/no_stale_payload + a punctuation-strip helper, sourced-only/side-effect-free) + 11 pass/fail fixtures. 1 contract revision (evaluator's content-blind stub proved 4 fixture checks were cheatable via identity-leaking filenames + entry 2 didn't prove side-effect-freedom; rev1 copies fixtures to neutral doc.md + strict empty-output assertion). Both contract gates re-approved.
